Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class SessionSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SessionSettings
public class SessionSettings extends Object

Java class for SessionSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SessionSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="allowUserAuthenticationByCertificate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="allowUserCertBasedAuthenticationWithOcspValidation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canConfirmEmailChangeInLightningCommunities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canConfirmIdentityBySmsOnly" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="disableTimeoutWarning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableBuiltInAuthenticator" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCSPOnEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCSRFOnGet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCSRFOnPost" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCacheAndAutocomplete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableClickjackNonsetupSFDC" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableClickjackNonsetupUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableClickjackNonsetupUserHeaderless" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableClickjackSetup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCoepHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContentSniffingProtection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCoopHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLightningLogin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLightningLoginOnlyWithUserPerm" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableMFADirectUILoginOptIn" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOauthCorsPolicy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePostForSessions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSMSIdentity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableU2F" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUpgradeInsecureRequests" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableXssProtection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enforceIpRangesEveryRequest" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enforceUserDeviceRevoked" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="forceLogoutOnSessionTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="forceRelogin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="hasRetainedLoginHints" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="hasUserSwitching" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="hstsOnForcecomSites" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="identityConfirmationOnEmailChange" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="identityConfirmationOnTwoFactorRegistrationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockSessionsToDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockSessionsToIp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockerServiceAPIVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockerServiceCSP" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockerServiceNext" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockerServiceNextControl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="logoutURL" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="redirectBlockModeEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="redirectionWarning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="referrerPolicy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="referrerPolicyDirective" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="requireHttpOnly" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="requireHttps" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sessionTimeout" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SessionTimeout" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sidToken3rdPartyAuraApp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="skipSFAWhenMFADirectUILogin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useLocalStorageForLogoutUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
